Hackney Planning Guide

Driveway Gate Planning in Hackney

Hackney requires careful planning research before a driveway gate installation. The combination of Article 4 directions in its more historic residential areas, an active planning enforcement team, and strong residents' groups means the pre-installation process requires more attention here than in many Outer London boroughs.

29
Conservation Areas
Yes — check your street
Article 4 Directions
May not apply
Standard 2m Rule
Higher
Planning Complexity
Article 4 Directions Apply in Hackney

Hackney has Article 4 directions that remove standard permitted development rights for boundary changes in some or all residential areas. A gate that would require no planning permission in most London boroughs may need a formal application here. Always verify your specific street before commissioning any work.

Key Rules

Key Planning Rules in Hackney

Article 4 directions cover significant parts of Stoke Newington and De Beauvoir

Conservation areas in Clapton and Homerton require additional care

Standard permitted development is limited in central Hackney

The planning department has been proactive in enforcement on boundary treatments in conservation areas

Local Context

Local Context

Hackney has become more active in conservation area enforcement in recent years. The Article 4 directions in Stoke Newington and De Beauvoir mean that gate installations in these areas require planning permission regardless of height.

Watch Out For

Common Planning Issues in Hackney

Stoke Newington Article 4 direction removes permitted development for most boundary changes

De Beauvoir has seen enforcement notices served for gates installed without consent

Several conservation areas in Clapton specifically mention gates as a character concern in their appraisal documents

National Permitted Development Baseline

✓ Gates adjacent to a highway — permitted up to 1 metre tall

✓ Gates on non-highway boundaries — permitted up to 2 metres tall

✗ Conservation areas, Article 4 directions, listed buildings override these rules

✗ Always check with Hackney Council planning department if you are unsure

Get a Quote in Hackney

Vetted installers who know Hackney planning rules inside out.

Within 2 hours · No obligation

Independent matching service connecting London homeowners and businesses with vetted, experienced gate installers across every borough.

We are a referral service. We connect you with independent gate installers. We do not carry out installations ourselves.
